summary: Completed testing of the new Hostinger-style email/SMTP settings UI in both platform superadmin and tenant admin. The shared EmailSettingsForm component uses a single 'Email Address' field as both SMTP username and from-address. All backend tests passed (platform_email_test.py: 6/6, smtp_auth_test.py: 4/4, poc_isolation.py: 35/35). Platform admin UI fully tested and working. Tenant admin uses the same component (verified in code and API).

integration_issues.issue: Tenant admin login page not working in browser automation (stays on login page after clicking SIGN IN). Backend API login works correctly via curl. This is a pre-existing login/routing issue, NOT related to the email settings feature.
integration_issues.note: Does not affect email settings functionality. Email settings API works correctly. Same EmailSettingsForm component is used in both platform and tenant admin.

passed_tests: Backend: platform_email_test.py - 6 passed, 0 failed (platform email settings save, password masking, single email-as-username, app-password space stripping, real test email delivery, wrong password returns 400)
Backend: smtp_auth_test.py - 4 passed, 0 failed (tenant email settings with username fallback, blank SMTP username uses sender email, app-password spaces stripped, wrong password surfaces error)
Backend: poc_isolation.py - 35 passed, 0 failed (regression test - platform dashboard, companies table, modals still work correctly)
Backend API: Platform email settings endpoints (GET/PUT/POST test) work correctly
Backend API: Tenant email settings endpoints (GET/PUT/POST test) work correctly with username fallback
Frontend Platform Admin: Email Settings button opens modal correctly

Frontend Platform Admin: All form fields present with correct data-testids (email-smtp-host, email-smtp-port, email-address, email-password, toggle-password, email-sender-name, save-email, test-to, send-test-email)
Frontend Platform Admin: Single 'Email Address' field present (Hostinger-style)
Frontend Platform Admin: Old separate 'Sender Email' and 'SMTP Username' fields removed
Frontend Platform Admin: 'How it works' section present
Frontend Platform Admin: Password toggle works correctly
Frontend Platform Admin: Form fields can be filled and saved
Frontend Platform Admin: Save button works
Code Review: Tenant admin Account.jsx uses the same EmailSettingsForm component with identical props

success_percentage.frontend_tenant_admin: API verified 100%, UI not testable due to pre-existing login issue (not related to email settings)
